SKILLS

kinds of modifications without compromising the design integri- ty of the BattleMech (use this skill instead of Technician Skill when checking for overall design   integrity; sce BattleTech Master Rules, 87).
ESCAPE ARTIST The Escape Artist Skill is used to break free of personal restraints and bindings from   simple rope to handcuffs and straitjackets It can also aid characters in escaping from impris onment similar large-scale entrapment: Successful Escape Artist Action Checks enable characters t0 squeeze between cell bars tunnel  under walls steal guard'$ keys slip out restraints and SO on. However; the Skill does not aid characters attempting to pick locks or  defeat security cameras_ These tasks are covered by the Security Systems Skill (p. 105).
DIsoUISE character with Disguise Skill can change his appearance enough to be taken for someone else_ To create Or pierce dis- guise requires an Action Check. Under optimum conditions cre- ating disguise requires access to specialized equipment such as makeup_ contact lenses and costume pieces such as plat- form shoes or padded clothing Improvised disguises are pOS- sible but with significant penalty (+1 to +3 for Iack of proper equipment) . When character uses this skill t0 create disguise tne gamemaster should make the Action Check for the character: This prevents the player from knowing how effective his charac ter' $ disguise will be. The Margin of Success becomes modi- fier for any other character attempting t0 see through the dis guise. Conversely; if the roll fails Margin of Failure becomes negative modifier, making easier for other characters to see through the disguise. If character disguising himself has par- ticularly bad roll_ the gamemaster may reveal this fact to the character as soon as he looks in Mirror: To penetrate disguise the character making the attempt makes Disguise Skill Check: If the character does not have Disguise Skill; he may make an untrained Skill Check as normal, but he also gets to add his Perception Skill Bonus t0 his roll Note that Disguise only affects character' $ physical appearance_ character who wants t0 alter nis behavior and mannerisms must use the Acting Skill (see 96).
FAST TALK This skill is used when character wants to trick confuse convince another character   verbally: differs trom the Negotiation Skill mainly in that used quickly; Negotiation requires lengthy process of discussion and is primarily used for bargaining: Fast Talk Check should be used when trying to get into that exclusive club_ talk your way past the guard or con- vince your CO you really weren off base without permission.
FIRST AID the name implies this skill covers   immediate basic emergency medical care. It can fully treat minor injuries bul MedTech and Surgery Skills are required for serious injuries these cases_ it is used to keep a injured person alive until full- scale treatment can be supplied_ For full rules on the use of this skill, see Healing; 123.
FORGERY character with Forgery Skill can produce and detect forg; eries Forgery deals primarily with the techniques for producing forged ignatures and documents, though it also gives the char- acter familiarity with equipment that can detect an art forgery by analyzing the chemical composition of paints and paper; The gamemaster should make the Forgery Action Check for character creating forgery; so that the character will be unaware of the forgery's effectiveness. (In the case of very bad roll, the gamemaster may reveal the result to the charac ter ) The Margin of Success achieved when creating forgery becomes the modifier for any Forgery Action Check made by character attempting to detect the forgery If the original roll failed _ the Margin of Failure becomes negative modifier for any detection rolls Characters attempting torge complex documents items must begin by   making an appropriate Art, Career Interest Skill Action Check: Tne Skill required depends on the type of forgery: For example character attempting to forge police report would make Career /Police Officer Skill Check: The roll"= Margin of Success iS used as negative modifier to the Forgery Target Number used to create the forgery: The roll"$
ENGINEERING The Engineering Skill deals with the complex principles of design_ manufacture and modification of equipment: This skill allows character to design equipment from scratch, modify existing designs  check for design flaws and determine how design would best be executed Engineering one of the most difficult and time consuming endeavors character can attempt; often requiring an entire staff of engineers and specialized equipment and computer sys tems Something as complex as modifying BattleMech design can take years and is well beyond the scope of this book; the gamemaster allows it, such activities can be pursued between game sessions; but bear in mind the impact  the proposed design could have on the campaign. During gaming_ Engineering   Skill is most often used for minor modifications such as retrofitting Mech with new equip ment making minor design changes such as replacing armor with extra neat sinks Skill Check is necessary to make these
